channel.title: Ardalis.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Ardalis.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How Software Developers Fail
item.description: “Software developers fail in two ways: they build the thing wrong, or they build the wrong thing.” These two separate failure modes are worth exploring independently, because they have different root causes and very different consequences. And Agentic AI “developers” face the same challenges, but can do both much more rapidly than their human counterparts. The Two Ways Developers Fail Building the Thing Wrong Building the thing wrong means the technical execution is flawed.
